entries.notes: Figma AlertNotification has 3 types: Success (green left border #42b040), Error (red left border #c91e27), Notification (no border, circle icon, plain). hasHeading=true → message slot, hasSubheading=true → description slot, hasButton=true → action slot (render CapButton with type='link'). Figma Notification type = info (closest color match). CapAlert spreads ...rest so all Ant Design Alert props (afterClose, banner, closable, closeIcon) pass through.

alternatives.note: Use only for transient/auto-dismiss toast messages, not persistent inline alerts

entries.notes: helpText/byline is not a direct CapInput prop — wrap with CapFormItem for label+byline+helpText layout. Avoid using Side label type (deprecated per Figma design docs).

alternatives.note: Use for search input variants with search icon prefix

entries.notes: Figma ListLabel type=Checkbox: checkbox (24px) + label text (14px medium) + optional suffix. Props: byline=true → pass as inductiveText prop (renders below the label in smaller secondary text). optional=true → append '(optional)' text as suffix prop. showTag=true → pass CapTag as suffix prop. errorMessage → adds error styling (pass className containing 'error'). CapCheckbox.Group → use for groups of checkboxes with onChange handler.

alternatives.note: Use CapCheckbox.Group when Figma shows a list of checkboxes with a shared onChange (Ant Design Checkbox.Group)

entries.notes: Figma ListLabel type=Radio: radio button (24px) + label (14px medium) + optional suffix. Props: byline=true → inductiveText prop (secondary text below label). optional=true → '(optional)' as suffix. showTag=true → CapTag as suffix. CapRadio extends Ant Design RadioProps and adds inductiveText, errorMessage, suffix. CapRadio.Group = Radio.Group for grouped radios. CapRadio.Button = Radio.Button for button-style radio groups.

alternatives.note: Use CapRadio.Group (= Ant Design Radio.Group) when Figma shows a list of radio options with shared onChange. Pass options array or CapRadio children.
Use CapRadio.Button inside CapRadio.Group for button-style (pill/tab) radio groups

entries.notes: Figma Cards type=Small (468px wide): avatar icon (48px) + label (14px medium) + description (12px secondary) + optional channels row. Border: #b3bac5, border-radius: 8px. hasIcon=true → Avatar slot (CapIcon or img 48px). hasChannels=true → row of icon+text labels (SMS, WeChat etc.) at bottom. hasTag=true → absolute positioned orange pill badge (top:-10px, left:16px). All content goes into CapCard children as layout. CapCard wraps Ant Design Card and spreads ...rest for any additional Ant Design Card props.

alternatives.note: type=Creative (276px): compact card with label+view/more icon buttons in header, description below, hover reveals a green CTA button overlay. No RadioCard or CustomCard in blaze-ui — implement as styled CapCard.

entries.notes: Figma Dropdown wrapper has: label→headerLabel, byline→bylineText, optional (no direct prop — append '(optional)' to headerLabel text), infoIcon→tooltip (pass string), hasHelpText→bylineText or wrap with CapFormItem. Expanded state (isSearchable=true) maps to showSearch=true.

alternatives.note: Use type='multiSelect' for Figma type=Multi input or Filter variants
Use type='treeSelect' or type='multiTreeSelect' for hierarchical data

entries.notes: Figma Type=Sidepane is a select trigger that opens a CapDrawer on click. The trigger input (chevron-right icon) is the field; the drawer content is the children. Wire the trigger's onClick to set open=true.
Filter type in Figma maps to multiSelect with showSearch and allowClear typically enabled

CapTable wraps Ant Design Table v5. Required prop: id (string). Key props: dataSource (array), columns (array of {title, dataIndex, key, sorter?, render?}), infiniteScroll (boolean → enables virtual scroll + auto-load on threshold), showLoader (boolean → shows loading overlay), setPagination (callback for infinite scroll next page), offset_limit ({offset, limit}), scroll ({x?, y?} — y defaults to 400px). Figma table has: checkbox column (rowSelection={{ type: 'checkbox' }}), sortable headers (column.sorter=true), row action group (TableActionGroup = icon buttons → render via column.render). Pagination is always disabled (false) when infiniteScroll=true.

Figma DropdownButton is a small icon button (three dots '...') that opens a contextual dropdown menu. Use CapDropdown wrapping a CapButton with type='flat' and an ellipsis icon as children. Size (Small=24px/Medium=32px/Large=40px) maps to CapButton size. Pass CapMenu items via the menu prop. This is NOT the same as CapUnifiedSelect — it's a contextual action menu trigger.

alternatives.note: CapDropdown.Button is the Ant Design Dropdown.Button which renders a split button with a primary action and a dropdown arrow — use when the Figma design shows a primary label+dropdown-arrow pattern

entries.notes: Figma Tool-tip uses dark navy background (#091e42) with white text — this matches CapTooltip's default dark style. `arrow` prop in Figma indicates which side the arrow points FROM (Left=arrow on left → tooltip is to the right of trigger → placement='right'). `hasKeyValue` and `hasDescription` → pass as rich JSX to title prop. `hasButton` → include CapButton type='link' in title content.

CapTooltipWithInfo renders a CapIcon (info-circle by default) wrapped in CapTooltip. Use when Figma shows an info (i) icon that shows a tooltip on hover. Props: title (tooltip content), iconType (default 'info-circle'), iconSize ('xs'|'s'|'m'|'l'), placement, trigger, tooltipProps (extra CapTooltip props), iconProps (extra CapIcon props).

Figma Modal structure (468px default width): white card, border-radius 4px, drop shadow. Internal _Modal_content layer has: (1) header row = Avatar (48px) + Label (14px medium) + Description (12px secondary) + close X button → render as Modal title prop containing CapRow with avatar/text/close. (2) content area = LayoutBlocks swap block → pass as children. (3) footer = No of button=2 row → Save (CapButton type=primary) + Cancel (CapButton type=secondary) → pass as footer prop. The close X icon button maps to closable=true (Ant Design handles it). Larger modal variant (798:422790, full-page) has same structure at larger width.

Figma DatePicker (type=Single) wrapper has: label (render above as CapLabel or CapFormItem label), hasByline/byline→no direct prop (wrap with CapFormItem), hasHelpText→no direct prop (wrap with CapFormItem for helper text), hasInfoIcon→use a CapTooltipWithInfo next to the label, isOptional→append '(Optional)' to label text. State border colors: Default=#dfe2e7, Hover=#7a869a, Focused=#091e42, Error=#c91e27, Disabled bg=#dfe2e7. Focused state opens calendar popup (_Calender base).

alternatives.note: Use when Figma shows Start Date → End Date range picker (two date fields)

entries.notes: Figma TitleHeader (max-width 1140px, px-48px, py-16px, white bg): composed as CapRow with: (1) back button (CapButton type='flat' with back arrow icon), (2) Avatar (48px circle with icon), (3) title+subheading wrapper (CapColumn: CapLabel type='h2' for title, CapRow for subheading with key-value pairs + Edit button), (4) right actions (CapRow: rightIconButton=close X, primaryCtaRight=primary button). Props: avatar=true → show 48px avatar, backButton=true → show back arrow, demoButton=true → show Demo link button, editSubhead=true → show Edit link in subheading row, labelIconButton=true → show icon button next to title. No dedicated blaze-ui CapPageHeader — compose from CapRow+CapColumn+CapLabel.

CapLabel type values from blaze-ui: 'label1' (default, 14px regular), 'label2', 'label3' (12px secondary), 'h1'–'h4' (heading sizes — h4 used in radio/checkbox label). fontWeight and lineHeight can override via props. CapLabel.CapLabelInline for inline (span) text. Figma 14px Medium → type='h4', 14px Regular → type='label1', 12px Secondary → type='label3', 24px Medium → type='h2'.

alternatives.note: Use for CSV/SKU file upload with download sample + upload history pattern (Figma flow=Horizontal/Vertical)
Use for drag-and-drop only upload without the CSV-specific instructions panel

entries.notes: Figma Note variants map to CapAlert: Note→warning(yellow), Success→success(green), Pending→warning(orange, closest), Caution→error(red), Stopped→info(gray, closest), Recommendation→info(blue). Exact colors differ slightly from Figma — override with className if needed.

alternatives.note: Use only for transient/dismissible notifications, not inline info notes

entries.notes: Figma uses orange background for Pending. CapAlert warning is yellow — closest match but not exact.

Figma type=Popover uses same dark navy (#091e42) background as Tool-tip. The Popover variant is richer: hasKeyValue=true → key-value pair rows in content (render as <dl> or CapRow pairs), hasDescription=true → description text below, hasButton=true → action button in content, isCustomisable=true → swappable content slot. `arrow` Figma prop = which side the arrow pointer is on (Left means arrow is on left side → placement='right' in CapPopover). Pass rich JSX as content prop.

Figma 'Single' tree dropdown (Frame 157:118547) maps to CapTreeSelect. Architecture: wraps antd TreeSelect directly. Dropdown shows tree hierarchy: parent items have caret-down (expanded) or caret-right (collapsed, opacity 40%) icons; child items indented pl-36px. Selected item: bg=#e9f0fe (--bg/sf/primary-focused) + 2px blue left border (#2466ea, --border/blue). Same trigger visual as CapSelect (40px, same border states). Key props: treeData (required), className, headerTitle, headerDescription, treeSelectSideLabel, disabledTooltip, infoNote, noteText, infoNoteWidth (default '60%'). All antd TreeSelect props pass through ...rest (treeCheckable, multiple, value, onChange, onSearch, showSearch, treeDefaultExpandAll, filterTreeNode, loadData for async).

alternatives.note: Use CapUnifiedSelect type='treeSelect' for the blaze-ui v5 unified approach

entries.notes: Figma 'Dropdown' type=Dropdown maps to CapSelect (antd Select wrapper). Trigger: 40px h, border-radius 4px. Border states: Default=#b3bac5, Hover=#7a869a, Focused=#091e42, Error=#c91e27, Disabled bg=#f4f5f7. Label above: 14px Medium (#091e42), optional adds '(Optional)' 12px. Byline: 12px Regular (#7a869a). infoIcon → wrap label with CapTooltipWithInfo. hasHelpText → inductiveText prop or wrap in CapFormItem. Dropdown list: max-h 408px, search bar pinned top, scroll, items 40px each. Long option text truncates. CapSelect wraps antd Select and adds ComponentWithLabelHOC for label/error/inductiveText. Pass options as [{label, value}] array.

alternatives.note: Use CapCustomSelect when options need custom rendering via getMenuOptionsProps

entries.notes: Figma Dropdown with isMultiInput=true maps to CapMultiSelect. Architecture: Tree + Popover (NOT antd Select mode=multiple). Trigger shows selected values as tag pills (bg=#dfe2e7, 12px text, x close icon). Key props: treeData (required, {key, title, children}), appliedKeys (selected keys array), onSelect (callback), placeholder, searchPlaceholder, disabled, width, disableSelectAll, maxValuesToSelect, enableVirtualizedRendering (boolean for Virtuoso), moreText ('+N more' label), noResultsFoundText, closeText, selectText, selectAllText. Figma shows: selected tags in trigger with x buttons (tag bg=#dfe2e7 #091e42 text 12px), dropdown with search bar + flat checkbox list, Select All at top. collapseOnSelect closes dropdown on single select. showFooter toggles footer close/select buttons.

alternatives.note: Use CapUnifiedSelect type='multiSelect' for the blaze-ui v5 unified approach

entries.notes: Figma 'Mixed single 1st level' (Frame 157:118563) maps to CapMultiSelectWithTree. Architecture: Tree + Popover. Dropdown shows: parent items with caret-down (expanded) or caret-right (collapsed) icons; child items indented pl-36px; selected child: 2px blue left border (#2466ea) + bg=#e9f0fe. Key props: treeData (required, hierarchical {key, title, children}), appliedKeys (selected keys), appliedKeyObjects (selected with titles), expandedKeys, expandedKeysHandler, onSelect, onChange, placeholder, searchPlaceholder, disabled, disableSearch, disableSelectAll, disableParentCategorySelection (prevent parent node selection), hideParentCheckboxes, enableSingleParentSelection, maxValuesToSelect, minValuesToSelect, onSearch (for external search), isExternalSearch, enableDebouncedSearch (200ms), showLoader, clearAllText, selectAllText, moreText, showSelectedFilterCount, showLeafNodeSelectionCount, resetSelectedKeysOnHide, onClose. replaceChildrenWithParent allows custom parent/child replacement logic.

alternatives.note: Use CapUnifiedSelect type='multiTreeSelect' for the blaze-ui v5 unified approach
